name: Reverse a Doubly Linked List
description: Given the head of a doubly linked list, reverse the list and return the new head. Each node has val, next, and prev pointers.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [0, 10^4]. -10^5 <= Node.val <= 10^5.

performance.stress_intent: exercise doubly linked lists that punish rebuilding the list node by node instead of swapping next and prev pointers in one pass
